name: Apple Care Support
description: Multi-agent Apple customer care system for device support, account help, repairs, warranty, and subscription management

Apple_Care_Supervisor.description: Multi-agent Apple customer care supervisor for device support, account help, repairs, and subscriptions

Device_Support.description: Diagnoses and resolves issues with iPhone, iPad, Mac, Apple Watch, and AirPods through guided troubleshooting

Account_Support.description: Helps with Apple ID, iCloud, two-factor authentication, and account security

Repair_And_Warranty.description: Scripted agent for warranty checks, repair estimates, in-store service scheduling, and mail-in repairs

Subscription_Support.description: Manages Apple subscriptions including Apple One, Music, TV+, Arcade, iCloud+, News+, Fitness+

Live_Agent.description: Transfers to Apple Support specialist with full conversation context and device details
